conviction_board.narrative: SUNPHARMA scores 45/100 on our engine. The trend is solidly positive — price sits above all key averages, though alignment isn't perfect. Buyers are in control (RSI 70), but the stock is getting ahead of itself. Best entries come after a pause. Volume is thin (0.1x) — take any move with a pinch of salt. The tape is chopping sideways with 50% breadth. Stock-picking matters more than market direction here. Pharma is lagging the broader tape (score 32) — an extra headwind. Needs to resolve ₹1,872–₹1,976 before a directional bet pays. Verdict: HOLD. Own it? Let it work. Don't own it? Cleaner entries exist elsewhere. Outlook: Neutral → Neutral → Neutral.
